mapper.sql: select id, ext_type, user_id, tg_user_id, super_user_id, channel_id, order_no, order_type, account_type, type, amount, old_amount, new_amount, remark, operator, sign_time, sign, create_time from t_user_ext_change
mapper.select: SELECT t.user_id, u.user_tg_name, t.already_rebate_amount FROM ( SELECT l.user_id, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN l.ext_type = 4 AND l.order_type = 2 AND l.type = 3 AND l.account_type = 2 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS already_rebate_amount FROM t_user_ext_change l WHERE l.create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY l.user_id ) t LEFT JOIN t_user u ON t.user_id = u.user_id

SELECT t.user_id, u.user_tg_name, t.already_return_commission_amount FROM ( SELECT l.user_id, SUM(IF( l.ext_type = 5 AND l.order_type = 2 AND l.type = 4 AND l.account_type = 2, l.amount, 0 )) AS already_return_commission_amount FROM t_user_ext_change l WHERE l.create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY l.user_id ) t LEFT JOIN t_user u ON t.user_id = u.user_id
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(id), 0) AS max_id FROM t_user_ext_change;
